title: Infection
description: A minecraft plugin which adds the famous minigame Infection by Hypixel
body:
Infection

A Minecraft plugin that adds the Hypixel minigame Infection to your server.

[![discord-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/social/discord-plural_46h.png)](https://discord.gg/wGKncuKFAw)
## Overview - How to use - What's new? - Permissions ## How to use 1. Use `/infection wand` to get the area selection wand. 2. Use the Selection Wand to select a map area. 3. Create a map using `/infection createmap `. 4. Set a queue spawn using `/infection setqueue-spawn `. 5. Optionally change the maximum queue size using `/infection setqueue-limit `. 6. Set the spawnpoints where survivors/infected players will spawn using `/infection addspawn `. 7. You can now join the map using `/infection join `. Use `/infection help guide` and `/infection help commands` for more information. ## What's new? ### Easily select map regions using the Selection Wand Use `/infection wand` to get the Selection Wand ## Permissions ```yml permissions: infection.join: description: Allows a player to run '/infection join ' default: true infection.leave: description: Allows a player to run '/infection leave' default: true infection.admin: description: Allows a player to access all of the '/infection ' commands. ```
